notes: Heavy armor specialist Unique base — one instance on the map. Tank Plant builds the full Heavy Tank roster (Juggernaut, Rocket Tank, Granite Crumbler, Chonky); Chonky is Fort Irongrad-exclusive (not built at Winter Forge's Frostworks or Scrapyard's Salvage Works). Granite Crumbler is also built at Scrapyard's Salvage Works (see data/bases/scrapyard.json) — no longer Fort Irongrad-exclusive. Sited on Plains, no terrain exception.
